title: Problem Json
description: Remote Studio adapters and the connect panel need predictable JSON errors, not stack traces or HTML. This spec requires mapping specd and kernel failures to RFC 7807 `application/problem+json` responses with stable codes consumed by `client:adapter-problem-json-errors`.
context: Remote Studio adapters and the connect panel need predictable JSON errors, not stack traces or HTML. This spec requires mapping specd and kernel failures to RFC 7807 `application/problem+json` responses with stable codes consumed by `client:adapter-problem-json-errors`.

rules: When a handler or middleware surfaces a failure, the response MUST use `Content-Type: application/problem+json` and include at least `type`, `title`, and `status` fields compatible with RFC 7807.

rules.requirement: SpecdError codes are preserved in the problem body
rules: When the thrown error is a `SpecdError` (or subclass), the problem payload MUST include the specd error code and any safe detail fields expected by `client:adapter-problem-json-errors`.

constraints: @specd/api delivery and composition code MUST import host bootstrap and kernel types from @specd/sdk, not @specd/core or @specd/code-graph directly.
HTTP handlers MUST NOT import @specd/core from @specd/ui or @specd/client.
v1 server auth: api.auth.type from specd.yaml (never studio.*); registry registers only disabled; no server-side Bearer enforcement on loopback or specd ui serve.
Artifact save/load MUST use core:save-change-artifact and core:get-change-artifact — not raw ChangeRepository.saveArtifact from HTTP handlers.
There is no GET /changes/{name}/validation resource; use GET .../status and POST .../validate.
Canonical workspace spec artifacts are read-only in Studio v1.

scenarios.name: Unexpected errors still use JSON envelope
then: AND client adapter can parse or fallback

scenarios.requirement: SpecdError codes are preserved in the problem body
scenarios.name: Specd code extension is included

scenarios.requirement: SpecdError codes are preserved in the problem body
scenarios.name: Safe details only in payload
then: no stack traces in production body

scenarios.requirement: SpecdError codes are preserved in the problem body
scenarios.name: Client adapter reads extensions
